index.scurry_is_the_digital_asset_an.value: Scurry is the digital asset and fiat platform for emerging markets, built to store, earn, own, invest, move, and spend multiple currencies and stablecoins.

index.scurry_is_a_modern_platform_fo.value: Scurry is a modern platform for consumers and businesses with stablecoin cards and global USD accounts

index.to_provide_comprehensive_and_e.value: To provide comprehensive and equitable financial services to all

index.scurry_is_building_long_term_c.value: Scurry is building long-term customer relationships around a hybrid human and AI financial model designed for global movement, modern ownership, and a more aligned financial experience.

index.we_are_here_for_the_people_and.value: We are here for the people and businesses who are currently underserved

index.a_business_in_buenos_aires_who.value: A business in Buenos Aires whose revenue fell 31% in 2025 due to inflation

index.an_exporter_in_mexico_city_tha.value: An exporter in Mexico City that pays a 6% fee and waits five days for a wire transfer

index.a_food_production_company_in_c.value: A food production company in Colombia that can't open a US bank account without a US entity, a US lawyer, and $10K in costs

index.individuals_sending_funds_back.value: Individuals sending funds back home who face a 3-7% deduction on their money

index.global_businesses_with_payroll.value: Global businesses with payroll obligations for outsourced operations down South that face high fees and slow transfers

index.scurry_is_solving_the_fundamen.value: “Scurry is solving the fundamental flaws of traditional finance—the excessive fees, low yields, and antiquated practices that burden both consumers and businesses. We're leveraging hybrid human/AI intelligence and Stablecoin technology to empower emerging markets with a truly global, fair, and innovative financial service alternative.”

index.the_app_is_still_in_developmen.value: The app is still in development, but the waitlist is live so people can get updates as Scurry prepares to launch

index.scurry_is_a_financial_technolo.value: Scurry is a financial technology company, not a bank. Virtual accounts, payment cards, custody, and on/off ramp services are provided by licensed partners. Availability of services may vary by jurisdiction and is subject to regulatory approval. We provide financial services through stablecoins. Registered Money Services Business in the United States, FinCEN.

personal.a_stablecoin_centered_personal.value: A stablecoin-centered personal experience designed to help customers choose their currency, store value, move money, and participate in the Scurry ecosystem

personal.centered_around_movement_owner.value: Centered around movement, ownership, and rewards

personal.hold_save_send_and_spend_multi.value: Hold, save, send, and spend multiple currencies

personal.spend_through_the_scurry_ecosy.value: Spend through the Scurry ecosystem with faster, more flexible modern card experiences

personal.consumer_credit_products_are_p.value: Consumer credit products are part of the broader Scurry ecosystem roadmap

business.launching_late_2026_scurry_is.value: Launching late 2026 - Scurry is building market specific Global USD, Credit and Stablecoin business products.

about.scurry_s_ambitions_are_to_be_a.value: Scurry’s ambitions are to be a global stablecoin and financial services platform.

about.high_inflation_and_unstable_cu.value: High inflation and unstable currencies create strong demand for more flexible financial infrastructure

about.scurry_is_aimed_at_users_and_o.value: Scurry is aimed at users and operators who still lack access to reliable financial services

about.enthusiasts_of_credit_and_bloc.value: Enthusiasts of credit and blockchain innovation

team.scurry_is_led_by_experts_in_fi.value: Scurry is led by experts in fintech, compliance, engineering, and global-scale technology execution

team.with_over_three_decades_of_exp.value: With over three decades of experience in financial services, Eric has worked across traditional banking, wealth technology, and fintech, specializing in operations, risk management, compliance, and financial crimes prevention. His career highlights include serving as a board-appointed Bank Secrecy Act Officer (BSAO) for four fintech companies, joining LendingClub as its seventh employee, co-founding AssetFort, and serving as BSA Officer at Oxygen and Slash. As a Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) with the Association of Certified Fraud Examiners (ACFE), he developed deep expertise in anti-money laundering controls and served as a Department of Justice witness in a major fintech case.

team.he_holds_bachelor_s_degrees_in.value: He holds Bachelor's degrees in Communication and Economics from the University of California San Diego (UCSD) and a Global Executive MBA from IE Business School in Madrid, Spain.

team.beyond_his_professional_pursui.value: Beyond his professional pursuits, Eric is an accomplished endurance athlete, competing in long-distance running and open-water marathon swimming. He is also the author of the fintech thriller Scurry (Fraud Squad).

team.an_innovative_and_results_driv.value: An innovative and results-driven Technology Executive with over 20 years of experience, Andreas has led global engineering organizations and delivered transformative platforms across fintech, cloud, and enterprise systems. He combines strategic vision with deep technical expertise to scale high-performing teams, modernize platforms, and integrate complex systems supporting high-volume users and transactions, consistently driving operational resilience and measurable business impact through a bias for action. Andreas partners with executive leadership to shape technology strategy, guide risk and operational decisions, and operationalize roadmaps that align technical initiatives with business priorities.

team.andreas_holds_a_bachelor_s_deg.value: Andreas holds a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from HTL Brugg-Windisch, Switzerland.

team.outside_work_andreas_is_an_avi.value: Outside work, Andreas is an avid tinkerer of robots, drones and 3D printed airplanes. He also supports the local high school robotics team.

team.learn_more_about_scurry_from_i.value: Learn more about Scurry from its leadership

faq.everything_you_need_to_know_ab.value: Everything you need to know about Scurry — our platform, products, and path to launch.

faq.scurry_is_currently_in_pre_lau.value: Scurry is currently in pre-launch. Some details — including pricing, full compliance policies, and partner-specific features — will be published once our pre-seed round closes and bank partner approvals are finalized. This page will be updated regularly.

faq.scurry_is_a_financial_technolo.value: Scurry is a financial technology company — not a bank — building a stablecoin platform for consumers and businesses in emerging markets, starting with Mexico and Latin America.

faq.we_bridge_traditional_finance.value: We bridge traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) by offering Global USD accounts, stablecoin-backed payment cards, and credit services. Think of us as a modern financial services alternative that combines the stability of the U.S. dollar with the speed and accessibility of blockchain technology.

faq.traditional_banking_in_emergin.value: Traditional banking in emerging markets is slow, expensive, and often inaccessible. Individuals sending money home lose 3–7% to fees. Exporters wait five or more business days for wire transfers while paying hefty charges. Small businesses can't open U.S. accounts without costly legal structures.

faq.scurry_addresses_these_systemi.value: Scurry addresses these systemic issues with a hybrid human/AI financial model that uses stablecoin technology to deliver faster, cheaper, and fairer financial services to people who need them most.

faq.scurry_was_co_founded_by_eric.value: Scurry was co-founded by Eric Kinney (Co-Founder & CEO) and Andreas Oesterer (Co-Founder & CTO), a team focused on bringing equitable financial services to underserved markets. We are currently in the process of closing our pre-seed venture round to fund the development and launch of our MVP products.

faq.learn_more_about_our_team_on_t.value: Learn more about our team on the

faq.no_scurry_is_a_fintech_company.value: No. Scurry is a fintech company, not a bank. Virtual accounts, payment cards, custody services, and on/off-ramp services are provided through our licensed banking and stablecoin partners. Scurry holds a registered Money Services Business (MSB) license with FinCEN in the United States.

faq.scurry_s_initial_product_suite.value: Scurry's initial product suite includes three core offerings:

faq.hold_and_transact_in_u_s_dolla.value: — Hold and transact in U.S. dollars from anywhere in the world, without requiring a U.S. entity or address.

faq.spend_stablecoins_wherever_maj.value: — Spend stablecoins wherever major cards are accepted, with real-time conversion at the point of sale.

faq.access_consumer_and_business_c.value: — Access consumer and business credit products designed for customers in emerging markets who are underserved by traditional lenders.

faq.scurry_is_establishing_partner.value: Scurry is establishing partnerships with leading stablecoin providers to ensure a stable and liquid experience for users. The full list of supported stablecoins will be announced prior to our app launch. Our focus is on dollar-pegged stablecoins that offer reliability, liquidity, and broad acceptance.

faq.will_scurry_offer_services_for.value: Will Scurry offer services for businesses as well as individuals?

faq.yes_scurry_is_designed_for_bot.value: Yes. Scurry is designed for both consumers and businesses. Our business product suite is aimed at companies that need global USD accounts, cross-border payroll solutions, and lower-cost international transfers — particularly those operating across Latin American markets. Detailed business features will be available on the

faq.what_role_does_ai_play_in_the.value: What role does AI play in the Scurry platform?

faq.scurry_employs_a_sophisticated.value: Scurry employs a sophisticated hybrid model that integrates human expertise with advanced AI to deliver a more personalized and efficient financial experience. Our AI infrastructure streamlines account management, enhances risk assessment for credit products, and provides responsive, 24/7 customer support. To ensure the highest standards of accuracy and accountability, human oversight is maintained for all high-stakes financial decisions. Central to this experience is Murry, the flying squirrel — Scurry’s official mascot and primary AI agent — dedicated to assisting both consumer and business users with their unique financial needs.

faq.who_is_eligible_for_a_scurry_a.value: Who is eligible for a Scurry account?

faq.scurry_is_designed_to_serve_gl.value: Scurry is designed to serve global citizens — individuals and businesses around the world who need access to USD accounts and stablecoin financial services. We are prioritizing users in Mexico and Latin America for our initial launch, with plans to expand to additional markets.

faq.availability_will_be_subject_t.value: Availability will be subject to jurisdictional regulations and partner approvals. Full eligibility criteria will be published prior to our app launch.

faq.how_do_i_join_the_waitlist.value: How do I join the waitlist?

faq.you_can_sign_up_for_early_acce.value: You can sign up for early access on the

faq.page_joining_the_waitlist_mean.value: page. Joining the waitlist means you'll receive updates on our launch timeline and may receive priority access when the app goes live.

faq.do_i_need_a_u_s_address_or_ent.value: Do I need a U.S. address or entity to open an account?

faq.no_one_of_scurry_s_core_value.value: No. One of Scurry's core value propositions is providing access to Global USD accounts without requiring a U.S. legal entity, lawyer, or physical address. We are building for the millions of individuals and businesses globally who have been locked out of the U.S. financial system due to these barriers.

faq.yes_scurry_is_a_registered_mon.value: Yes. Scurry is a registered Money Services Business (MSB) with the U.S. Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN). We operate with a compliance-first philosophy, prioritizing regulatory alignment from day one — even before our platform goes live.

faq.financial_services_on_the_scur.value: Financial services on the Scurry platform will be provided by licensed banking and stablecoin partners who hold their own regulatory approvals.

faq.are_my_funds_safe_with_scurry.value: Are my funds safe with Scurry?

faq.scurry_is_not_yet_a_live_platf.value: Scurry is not yet a live platform, so no customer funds are held at this time. When we launch, customer funds and stablecoin holdings will be managed through licensed partner institutions with their own regulatory safeguards. Full details on fund custody, partner protections, and applicable guarantees will be disclosed prior to launch.

faq.scurry_is_currently_finalizing.value: Scurry is currently finalizing our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use in coordination with our banking partners. Final approval on all compliance policies is expected shortly after our pre-seed investment round closes.

faq.we_are_committed_to_transparen.value: We are committed to transparent, user-first data practices. Full documentation will be published on this website prior to app launch.

faq.does_scurry_conduct_kyc_know_y.value: Does Scurry conduct KYC (Know Your Customer) verification?

faq.yes_as_a_registered_msb_and_in.value: Yes. As a registered MSB and in alignment with our banking partners' requirements, Scurry will conduct KYC verification for all account holders. This is a legal requirement and a cornerstone of our compliance-first approach. Details of the verification process will be outlined when the app launches.

faq.scurry_s_complete_fee_schedule.value: Scurry's complete fee schedule will be published prior to our app launch. Pricing is being finalized in coordination with our banking and stablecoin partners and is subject to regulatory approvals.

faq.our_commitment_is_to_offer_sig.value: Our commitment is to offer significantly lower fees than traditional banks and money transfer operators — one of our founding principles is eliminating the excessive costs that burden people in emerging markets.

faq.will_there_be_fees_for_interna.value: Will there be fees for international transfers?

faq.we_are_building_scurry_specifi.value: We are building Scurry specifically to reduce the cost of moving money internationally — a market where traditional providers charge 3–7%. Our fee structure for transfers will be disclosed in the full fee schedule, published before launch.

faq.when_will_the_scurry_app_be_av.value: When will the Scurry app be available?

faq.the_scurry_app_is_currently_un.value: The Scurry app is currently under development and is expected to launch in mid to late 2026. The exact date depends on completion of our pre-seed investment round and final approval from our banking and stablecoin partners.

faq.to_be_among_the_first_to_know.value: to be among the first to know when we go live.

faq.what_is_a_pre_seed_round_and_h.value: What is a pre-seed round and how does it affect Scurry's launch?

faq.a_pre_seed_round_is_an_early_s.value: A pre-seed round is an early-stage venture investment that provides the capital needed to build and launch our MVP. Closing this round is a key milestone that will enable us to finalize our banking partnerships, complete compliance approvals, and bring the Scurry app to market.

faq.some_details_including_our_ful.value: Some details — including our full Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and fee schedule — will be published once the pre-seed closes and partner approvals are finalized.

faq.which_markets_will_scurry_laun.value: Which markets will Scurry launch in first?

faq.scurry_is_prioritizing_mexico.value: Scurry is prioritizing Mexico and Latin America for our initial launch, given the significant need for better cross-border remittance solutions in these regions. We plan to expand to additional markets over time. Global waitlist registrations are open, and availability will be confirmed by country as we approach launch.

faq.how_can_i_stay_updated_on_scur.value: How can I stay updated on Scurry's progress?

faq.for_email_updates_you_can_also.value: for email updates. You can also follow us on

faq.for_announcements_team_updates.value: for announcements, team updates, and news about our launch milestones.

faq.we_re_happy_to_hear_from_you.value: We're happy to hear from you.

faq.reach_out_and_we_ll_get_back_t.value: Reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

blog.notes_on_stablecoins_credit.value: Notes on stablecoins, credit, payments, and financial access from the Scurry team.
